description_long: This rifle features a compact bullpup configuration with a distinctive black and tan color scheme. The main body is constructed from a matte black material, likely polymer or composite, with a tan upper handguard and integrated carrying handle. The rifle has a prominent rail system on top for mounting optics or accessories, and the trigger assembly is set well forward, typical of bullpup designs. The magazine is inserted behind the grip, and the barrel is relatively short, ending in a small muzzle device. The overall design is modern and ergonomic, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, black and tan bullpup rifle with a top rail and short barrel, featuring a modern, ergonomic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, compact barrel, and the alignment of the handguard and rail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bullpup layout, tan handguard, top rail, and the magazine position behind the grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock end, the top rail, and the overall compactness of the rifle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same bullpup configuration, with visible details of the handguard and magazine area.
